summary: Iteration 3 (Leaves quota / Holidays / Discipline escalation / Calendar / Assets / NOC / Schedules / Approval-redirect) tested via new pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_iter3_assets_leave_discipline.py and a UI smoke. Result: 19/21 PASS. The 2 failures both stem from a SINGLE critical app bug in /app/leave/views.py LeaveCreateView quota-check (TypeError on string-date subtraction in provisional LeaveRequest). All other items pass: holiday seed/CRUD/fetch, working_days_in_month with holidays, half-day quota helper, late-escalation 2/3/4/5 (4 records, 2.5d total deduction), payroll integration with discipline_days==2.50, Cinema dept exempt, birthday/anniversary SMS stubs, leave redirect (PENDING + AuditLog), calendar grid, assets dashboard issue+return, NOC issue/template-download/sign upload, discipline list+revoke, all 4 django_q schedules registered, every required data-testid present.

critical.issue: LeaveCreateView quota-check raises TypeError 500 for any non-HALF leave type. /app/leave/views.py lines 125-129: provisional = LeaveRequest(start_date=request.POST.get('start_date'), end_date=request.POST.get('end_date')) keeps the dates as strings, then _half_day_count(provisional) calls provisional.duration_days which does `(end_date - start_date).days + 1` -> TypeError: unsupported operand type(s) for -: 'str' and 'str'. Reproduces with FULL/SICK/EMERGENCY leave types. Also impacts test_quota_blocks_3day_sick and test_quota_progressive (the FULL step). Fix: pass parsed `sd` and a parsed `ed = datetime.strptime(end_date,'%Y-%m-%d').date()` to the provisional, OR compute half-day count manually without instantiating LeaveRequest. HALF_DAY path returns Decimal('1') early so HALF leaves are unaffected (which is why the iteration_2 leave tests passed).

issues: Tailwind still loaded via cdn.tailwindcss.com (carry-over from iteration_1; cosmetic only).

critical_code_review_comments: leave/views.py line 125: passing raw POST strings into a model instance is a footgun whenever the model has @property methods that operate on those fields — convert to native types at the boundary.

attendance/signals.py _escalate_discipline line 75 has an awkward double-execution of the same values_list('id', flat=True) queryset and a complex inline ternary; works correctly but readability suffers — refactor to a single materialised list.

assets/views.py NOCSignView allows employee OR HR/MD; correct. AssetIssueView wraps everything in a try/except Exception which swallows ValidationError details into a generic message — consider narrowing.

payroll/service.working_days_in_month falls back to Mon-Sat if dept is None and silently swallows Holiday import errors; OK for tests but the broad `except Exception: pass` could mask a real schema regression.
leave/views.py LeaveDecisionView 'redirect' branch reuses AuditLog.ActionType.LEAVE_REQUESTED for the redirect event — semantically a new LEAVE_REDIRECTED action would be cleaner (minor).

All required data-testids verified present via template grep + live UI smoke: card-assets (dashboard), asset-issue-form, asset-issue-submit, assets-table, asset-return-<pk>, noc-issue-form, noc-issue-submit, noc-table, noc-template-<pk>, noc-signed-<pk>, link-discipline, discipline-table, discipline-toggle-<pk>, link-calendar, link-holidays, leave-calendar-grid, cal-month, cal-go, holidays-fetch-btn, holiday-add-form, holiday-add-submit, holidays-table, holiday-toggle-<pk>, holiday-delete-<pk>, leave-redirect-<pk>.

Discipline escalation order verified deterministic: chronological 5 attendances on Jul 1-5 produced records on Jul 2 (WARN, 0d), Jul 3 (HALF, 0.5d), Jul 4 (FULL, 1d), Jul 5 (FULL, 1d) = 2.5d total. Cinema dept exempt verified.
Payroll persistence: late_deduction_days=2.5 written into Payroll model; gross uses earned_basic + ot + incentive - discipline_amount with floor at 0.
django_q.models.Schedule contains all 4 required rows: payroll-monthly-28th, birthday-sms-daily, anniversary-sms-daily, kerala-holiday-fetch-yearly.
NOC FileResponse returns Content-Type containing 'pdf' as expected; signed upload flips status DRAFT→ISSUED→SIGNED correctly.

success_rate.backend: 90% (19/21 — 2 fails caused by 1 root-cause bug in leave/views.py)
success_rate.frontend: 100% UI smoke (all data-testids present, navigations OK)

test_credentials: MD: md_aec/adminpassword123 (TOTP enforced — skip MD-only tests OR clear TOTPDevice rows). HR: hr_aec/hrpassword123
seed_data_creation: Tests created: TEST_iter3 holiday rows (deleted in same test), TEST_iter3 LeaveRequest reasons step1/step2 (auto-cleaned by setup_method/teardown_method), Jul 2026 Attendance 1-5 + DisciplineRecord rows for HR, optional TEST_CIN001 profile + Jul-10 attendance for Cinema exemption test, TEST_iter3 PHONE asset (deleted at end), TEST_iter3 NOC with template+signed PDFs (deleted at end). holiday_fetch_kerala(2026) seeded the 15 Kerala holidays (idempotent — safe to re-run).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: cd /app && /root/.venv/bin/python -m pytest backend/tests/test_iter3_assets_leave_discipline.py -v. The 2 failing quota tests will turn green AS SOON AS the leave/views.py date-parsing bug is patched (no test changes needed). The discipline tests rely on Q_CLUSTER sync=True which is the current setting per /app/memory/test_credentials.md note 33 — if that changes back to async, wrap the signal-triggered creates with override_settings(Q_CLUSTER={'sync': True, ...}).
rca of the issue:
RCA — POST /leave/new/ 500 for FULL/SICK/EMERGENCY:
1. Reproduction: log in as hr_aec, POST /leave/new/ with leave_type=SICK, start_date=2026-09-01, end_date=2026-09-03.
2. Observation: TypeError in /app/leave/views.py line 129 (`unsupported operand type(s) for -: 'str' and 'str'`).
3. Root cause: line 125 `provisional = LeaveRequest(start_date=start_date, end_date=end_date)` — start_date/end_date are still raw strings from request.POST; line 129 invokes `_half_day_count(provisional)` which (for non-HALF types) returns `days * 2` where `days = Decimal(leave.duration_days)`, and `LeaveRequest.duration_days` (core/models.py:366) does `(self.end_date - self.start_date).days + 1` — date arithmetic on strings fails.
4. Mitigation: parse end_date to a date object alongside `sd` and pass them to the provisional. Approx 3 lines of code in /app/leave/views.py.
